effect: Karrie enters Dual Wield state for the next 6s, gaining 80% ATK Speed. Every ATK releases 2 lightwheels (triggering ATK Effects), each dealing (+70%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG. Passive: Basic ATKs apply a stack of Lightwheel Mark. Targets with 5 stacks of Lightwheel Mark are pierced for (+130%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG.

Lancelot dashes, dealing (+170%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to enemies along the path. Each cast grants 1 additional dash on the next cast. Max dashes: 3. Passive: After dashing 3 time(s), each dash leaves behind a phantom that deals (+170%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to enemies along the path.
Angela releases Love Energy toward her current target, dealing (+570%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG to enemies. Allies hit by the skill restore (+240%Total Magic ATK) HP.
Lunox dashes to a safe location and releases 3 Chaos Assault(s), each dealing (+380%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG. Killing an enemy grants 1 additional cast of Chaos Assault.
Silvanna awakens her will, gaining 250 Shield and 30% ATK Speed for 3s.

Julian hurls a powerful scythe forward, dealing (+200%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG to the first enemy hit. The scythe remains in place, dealing (+30%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG to nearby units every 0.25s for 2s. Upon skill cast, Julian also gains a Shield equal to 15% of Max HP for 4s.

Lesley fires a fatal bullet at a target, dealing (+200%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG, and summons 4 Leonin(s) to attack random enemies, each dealing (+100%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG. (All DMG can trigger ATK Effects.) Passive: Lesley gains 45% Crit Chance. Every 1% of extra ATK Speed converts to 3% Crit DMG (Max Crit DMG: 500%). Her
notes: Second Physical Bonus row (Leonin): 100%/100%/200%; effect text cut off at bottom (passive continues)

effect: When battle starts, Ling summons a Skyscraper and stands atop it, restoring 20 Mana every 0.5s. Upon reaching full Mana, he charges to the area with the most enemies, dealing (+135%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG in a small area (DMG decreases with the number of enemies hit) and summons the Skyscraper at a new location.
